name: LADWP Residential R-1(B) Time-of-Use — Zone 1
utility: Los Angeles Department of Water and Power (municipal)

provenance.notes: RECONSTRUCTED for the Jul-Sep 2025 factor quarter, High Season. Total per-period rate = base energy charge + adjustment factors $0.15867/kWh (= FILED composite ECAF $0.11212 eff 2025-07-01, LADWP board letter read directly, + other factors ESA+RCA+IRCA $0.04655 derived from USURDB Q1-2025 snapshot minus filed Jan-2025 ECAF $0.10499 - same residual validated against published R-1A totals to ~0.1 c). Base rates (filed vintage via USURDB 2022-23 + 2025 entries, both sourced to LADWP's official rate summary): High Peak $0.15858, Low Peak $0.10018, Base $0.07274 (summer). TOU windows from the USURDB 2022-23 July schedule, corroborated published (tou.tools, solar.com): weekdays High Peak 13:00-16:59, Low Peak 10:00-12:59 and 17:00-19:59, Base 20:00-9:59; weekends all Base. Resulting 31.7/25.9/23.1 c/kWh matches published approximations (~31 / 22-27 / ~23, solar.com + shaffercon.com). Weakest: the summer weekend Base rate (USURDB 2022 entry maps July weekends to the $0.07664 low-season base row - likely curation slip; encoded at the summer base $0.07274, +-0.4 c). $12.00/mo service charge (USURDB + published). No usage tiers on R-1(B). The ordinance's EV discount (-$0.025/kWh on a designated charging block) is NOT encoded. Export: LADWP retail-rate net metering (energysage.com/local-data/net-metering/ladwp/, dsireusa.org program 4855).
